title: 視覺出題：讓圖表、構造圖自動出題
prompt:
# Codex PPT Slide Image Prompt

## Canvas
{
  "type": "16:9 full-slide PowerPoint image",
  "language": "Chinese",
  "slide_number": 15,
  "render_slide_number": false
}

## Deck Goal
為高中與國中教師提供基於大型語言模型的智慧教學評量工作流研習簡報。

## Required Background
{
  "deck_context": {
    "source_summary": "介紹 AI 在素養導向評量中的應用，涵蓋出題、改題與解題的智慧化工作流，由淺入深提升教師評量設計與智慧批改能力。",
    "core_claim": "AI 是最強大的智慧助教，能釋放教師的時間，專注於引導探究與師生互動。",
    "canonical_terms": [
      "素養導向評量",
      "提示詞工程",
      "智慧批改",
      "解題知識庫",
      "AI 代理人"
    ]
  }
}

## Global Style
{
  "name": "清爽專業風 (A風格)",
  "visual_direction": "clean professional presentation style with light gray background, clean cards, and clear typography",
  "color_palette": "light gray background, deep blue main text and headers, vibrant teal accent colors",
  "typography": "large clean sans-serif Chinese headings, highly legible body text with clear hierarchical alignment",
  "texture_and_finish": "flat editorial look, clean cards, balanced spacing"
}

## Style Reference Images To Inspect

- Style Reference 1: /Users/froglssh/Library/CloudStorage/GoogleDrive-frog@lssh.tp.edu.tw/我的雲端硬碟/0AI應用/0-AI輔助出改解題/AI輔助考卷出改解題研習/origin_image/slide_18.png — approved sample slide style reference; match style only; do not copy layout or content

Inspect these images before generation to understand the approved deck style. Do not pass them to the image backend as input images unless this slide explicitly lists them under Input Images.

## Slide
{
  "number": 15,
  "title": "視覺出題：讓圖表、構造圖自動出題",
  "role": "concept explanation",
  "intent": "介紹多模態視覺 AI 在圖表題命題上的應用"
}

## Text
{
  "title": "視覺出題：讓圖表、構造圖自動出題",
  "key_points": [
    "使用 Gemini 等多模態視覺 AI 的圖像識別能力",
    "直接上傳課本構造圖（如心臟瓣膜與心房）、地圖或統計圖表",
    "AI 識別圖中標示（如構造 A、B、C）並針對特定結構出題",
    "解決過去圖表題需要手動描圖或辛苦排版的命題痛點"
  ],
  "speaker_focus": null
}

## Layout
{
  "composition": "diagram visualization in the center, surrounding question boxes connected by lines"
}

## Visual Elements
{
  "main_visual": "heart structure diagram with letters A, B, C pointing to quiz boxes"
}

## Constraints
[
  "Clean diagram layout, lines pointing to questions must align perfectly"
]

## Style Reference Rule
Use the approved sample-slide style reference as visual guidance only. Match its palette, typography mood, density, texture, and overall visual identity. Do not copy its exact layout unless this slide's layout explicitly asks for it. For normal new slide generation, use the generate endpoint and express the inspected style through the prompt instead of attaching the sample as an edit input.

## Universal Constraints
- The final image itself must contain the title and key points.
- Render Chinese text exactly and legibly; avoid garbled characters.
- Keep the confirmed deck style consistent while varying layout by slide role.
- No watermark, unrelated logo, or extra slide number.

style_reference_images.path: /Users/froglssh/Library/CloudStorage/GoogleDrive-frog@lssh.tp.edu.tw/我的雲端硬碟/0AI應用/0-AI輔助出改解題/AI輔助考卷出改解題研習/origin_image/slide_18.png
style_reference_images.fidelity: match style only; do not copy layout or content

sample_generation_method.approved_sample_path: /Users/froglssh/Library/CloudStorage/GoogleDrive-frog@lssh.tp.edu.tw/我的雲端硬碟/0AI應用/0-AI輔助出改解題/AI輔助考卷出改解題研習/origin_image/slide_18.png
sample_generation_method.input_context_preparation: inspect style references before generation; pass strict input assets with edit --image only when a slide job lists input_images
sample_generation_method.handoff_rule: Subagents must use this same backend/tool/config; use generate for new slides unless the assigned job has strict input_images or is a repair.
